overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy game showing a character in pajamas walking through a gothic common room, descending a stone staircase, and entering a dormitory bedroom to sleep. The environment features medieval architecture with arched windows, stone walls, warm firelight, and wooden bunk beds.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic common room with central fireplace

agents.ego_description: static camera observing the empty common room before character enters

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with wooden canopy in the center of the room
tall gothic arched windows with diamond panes showing night sky
brown leather chairs arranged around the fireplace
iron chandelier hanging from the vaulted ceiling
rough stone wall texture with wooden paneling

segments.scene_description: A static establishing shot of an empty gothic common room with a central stone fireplace, leather armchairs, and tall arched windows. Warm light emanates from the fireplace and hanging chandelier, illuminating the stone walls and ornate carpets.

events.description: camera begins following character walking through the common room

agents.ego_description: character in white pajamas walking steadily toward the stone archway exit

entered.detail: arched stone doorway leading to the staircase
wooden writing desk with stacked books and papers

segments.scene_description: The camera follows a character in white pajamas walking through the common room toward a stone archway. The central fireplace and armchairs fall behind as the character approaches a wooden desk and the exit arch.

events.description: character enters narrow stone stairwell from the common room
passing wall lanterns creates shifting warm light patterns on stone walls

agents.ego_description: character walking down wooden stairs in a narrow stone tower passage

entered.detail: winding stone staircase with worn wooden steps
dark wooden handrail with carved balusters
oil paintings in gold frames hanging on the stair walls
medieval-style iron lanterns mounted on the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The character descends a narrow stone staircase with wooden steps and handrails. Warm light from wall-mounted lanterns illuminates framed portraits on the stone walls as the camera follows the descent.

events.description: character enters bedroom through wooden door at bottom of stairs
character approaches bunk bed and lies down on lower bunk
sleep interaction triggered, character begins sleeping animation

agents.ego_description: character enters the bedroom, approaches the wooden bunk bed, and lies down to sleep

entered.detail: tall wooden bunk beds with ladders and green curtains
heavy green fabric curtains around the bed frames
wooden chest of drawers with brass handles
gothic window with blue diamond-patterned glass
small lamp on nightstand emitting warm light

segments.scene_description: The character enters a cozy dormitory bedroom with wooden bunk beds and green curtains. After approaching the bed, the character lies down on the lower bunk and falls asleep. The camera settles into a stationary position showing the sleeping character in the warmly lit room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a grand, open gothic common room into the intimate seclusion of a dormitory bedroom. It begins with a wide view of a stone hall illuminated by a central fireplace and chandelier, before the camera begins to track a character in white pajamas walking away from the leather armchairs and toward a stone archway. As the character passes a wooden desk and exits the room, the scene shifts to a descent down a narrow stone staircase where wall-mounted lanterns cast a warm glow over framed portraits. The camera then follows the character through a final doorway into a cozy bedroom filled with wooden bunk beds and green curtains. Finally, the movement settles into a stationary position as the character lies down on a lower bunk and falls asleep in the softly lit room.
